# Trigonometry problem-solving strategy

## Short Teaching Summary
Trigonometry problem-solving strategy: Using standard trigonometric values helps students solve problems manually by focusing on the problem setup rather than complex calculations. Map connection: this idea links by analogy_for to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
